name: pagination
title: Pagination
author: Toby Belhome
description: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

files.content:
import {
  Pagination,
  PaginationContent,
  PaginationEllipsis,
  PaginationItem,
  PaginationLink,
  PaginationNext,
  PaginationPrevious
} from "@/components/ui/pagination";

export default function PaginationDemo() {
  return (
    <Pagination>
      <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationPrevious href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">1</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#" isActive>
            2
          </PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">3</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationEllipsis />
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationNext href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
      </PaginationContent>
    </Pagination>
  );
}
